title: Koenig Twisted Squares FAIL: demonstrates a wrong H value breaking H²-G²=2CF
sources: QA L-element and Koenig I-H descent chain, elements.txt (Iverson, 1991)
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: fundamental (d,e)=(2,1) declares H=8 instead of the correct H=C+F=4+3=7, breaking H²-G²=2CF=24.
